description:
Is it True or Misselling - ICICI Lombard Elevate Health Insurance? #healthinsurance #insuranceimpact #hindi #insurance #harvindersingh #insuranceagency #insuranceagents #insuranceagent 

Icici Lombard Elevate Plan offers various addons in the policy but there is a confusion in the mind of the our viewers while buying ICICI Lombard elevate Health pan.

Some of the viewers when tried to buy icici elevate plan , the company executives told them that you have to take 5 addons with the elevate plan. And it's a compulsion if you want to buy this plan. But how it can be true that if the said features are given as optional features, how can they be compulsory to buy ?
so In this video we are checking in depth the truth of the matter.

so don't miss the video...

आप हमारे वीडियो को पसंद करते हैं, तो आप हमें सब्सक्राइब कर सकते हैं:

comments.text:
Refer information in video for fresh policies only.

Port Cases update- 
1.10 lakh minimum sum insured.
2. Some addons(4-5) will be given as standard plan.

For fresh policies,no such compulsion.
comments.author: @insuranceimpact

comments.text: Does it cover kidney transplant cost with ped? Uska Waiting limit kitna hain?
comments.author: @RajKumar-xyz123

comments.text: Organ Transplants are generally covered after 2 years, check list of specific disease or talk to insurer directly to confirm this exactly
comments.author: @insuranceimpact

comments.text: Thankyou sir

Hnji, aap Room Modifier add on se 3 options le sakte hain:
1. Any Room
2. Twin Sharing
3. 1 % Room Rent, 2 % ICU charges.

1. Upgrade
2. Downgrade 
3. 1% of insurance cover for room & 2% of Insurance cover for ICU

comments.text: Infinite care aur power booster me kya difference hai aur kaun sa better hai agar oolicy 5 year se jyada ki ho to
comments.author: @musicuniverse5896

comments.text:
Infinite care मे during a policy period आपके insurance cover से ज्यादा कितना भी cover आता है तो उसका approval मिल जायेगा 

Power Booster : हर साल आपका insurance cover base insurance cover जितना है उससे 100 times बढेगा for e.g. 10 Lacs - 20 Lacs - 30 Lacs
